description_long: This is a modern, rectangular table with a minimalist design, featuring a long main surface and an attached, smaller elevated side platform. The tabletop and side platform both have a dark, wood-like finish, while the supporting frame is constructed from sleek, metallic square tubing. The frame consists of four main legs supporting the primary surface and two additional legs for the side platform, all connected by clean, angular lines. The side platform is offset and elevated, creating a functional two-tiered structure ideal for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or public seating areas. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian yet stylish, with no visible decorative embellishments. The table appears robust and suitable for outdoor or semi-public use.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a dark wood-like top and a metal frame, featuring an attached elevated side platform. Its minimalist, two-tiered design is functional and stylish for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the main tabletop and the attached elevated side platform on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the main table and the square shape of the elevated side platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the main tabletop and the supporting frame of the side platform on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the main table and the elevated side platform on the left.
